1855280.name: Fantasy Grounds - Journal of the Travellers' Aid Society Volume 3
1855280.description:
Journal of the Travellers' Aid Society Volume 3

Each JTAS volume is a treasure trove of information and game additions for Traveller, including adventures, new ships, alien creatures from across Charted Space, philosophical musings on the big empires, histories, different takes on familiar equipment, new vehicles, characters to be met in starports, playable alien races, and much, much Volume Three, you will find:
  • Adventure: Rescue on Ruie
  • Adventure: Pride of the Lion
  • Alien: Ael Yael
  • Bestiary: Smaetal Swarm, Springer, Kian, Hoplite, Ivory Gazelle, Garhawk
  • Central Supply: Cartridge Laser Weapons
  • Charted Space: Cordillon
  • Charted Space: Religion in the Two Thousand Worlds
  • Charted Space: The Arhiyao Clan
  • Charted Space: Zhodani Military Organisation
  • Encounters: Jonny McRae
  • High Guard: Jump Drive Operations
  • High Guard: Tvastar Manufacturing Ship
  • High Guard: LSP Modular Cutter
  • High Guard: LSP JCSDM Model 12
  • Mercenary: War in the Fourth Dimension
  • Travelling: Stock Exchange
  • Travelling: Jump Point to Port
  • Vehicles: Port Porter Transport Vehicle, Port Porter Light Security Vehicle
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Traveller 2E (Mongoose) ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
